description:
## Deep Component Audit — hx-alert

**Component directory:** `packages/hx-library/src/components/hx-alert/`
**wc-mcp Health Score:** 100 (A) — No issues found in CEM documentation.

### Audit Scope (ALL areas — leave nothing unchecked)

1. **Design Tokens** — Verify ALL CSS custom properties use `--hx-` prefixed tokens. No hardcoded values. Three-tier cascade. Dark mode overrides.
2. **Accessibility (A11Y)** — WCAG 2.1 AA. ARIA roles (alert/status). Live regions. Keyboard dismissal. Focus management on close. Screen reader announcements.
3. **Functionality** — All public properties, methods, events. Variants (info, success, warning, error). Dismissible behavior. Auto-dismiss timer. Slot behavior.
4. **TypeScript** — Strict mode. No `any`. Proper exports.
5. **CSS/Styling** — Shadow DOM encapsulation. CSS Parts. Responsive. Icon integration.
6. **CEM Accuracy** — Score 100 per wc-mcp. Verify this holds after deep inspection.
7. **Tests** — Coverage 80%+. All variants. Dismiss behavior. ARIA live region. Timing.
8. **Storybook** — All variants (info/success/warning/error). Dismissible toggle. Autodocs.
9. **Drupal Compatibility** — Twig-friendly. Server messages map to component variants.
10. **Portability** — CDN-ready. No external deps.

### Deliverable
Detailed markdown audit report. Fix CRITICAL+HIGH. Document MEDIUM+LOW.
title: Deep Audit v2: hx-alert
